author: y4rr
content: Pass 1 APPROVE (clean). 11 distributed surface-coverage gaps closed via real conformance tests using SimulatedBackend (no exclusions added — default-to-test-not-exclude held). 7 collective fns + 3 p2p fns + 1 enum (DistCheckpointError). conformance_distributed: 61 PASS (was 50, +11).
